answer: The main news includes the Sensex hitting a record high amid a global market rally, with tech and banking stocks leading the surge due to positive earnings reports and expectations of interest rate cuts by the US Federal Reserve [Source 1]. Additionally, the IT sector is expected to see a 15% rebound in hiring, driven by projects in generative AI, cloud migration, and cybersecurity [Source 2], while gold prices have stabilized after weeks of volatility [Source 3].
citations: Sensex Hits Record High Amid Global Market Rally
IT Sector Hiring Expected to Rebound by 15%
Gold Prices Stabilize After Weeks of Volatility
